title: CURIE Family Map
description: Wave 137b: Declares CURIE clusters that exhibit cross-CURIE coupling. If any CURIE in a family is `complete`, every CURIE in the family must be `complete` before retrain to prevent asymmetric anchoring (FamilyCompletenessValidator enforces this on the post-overlay form_data).

description.description: Optional free-form description of the family map's intent.

families.description: Object mapping family-name -> array of CURIE strings (each family must declare at least 2 CURIEs).

singletons.description: CURIEs that participate in no family — they are evaluated independently by the FamilyCompletenessValidator.
